COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-20-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye #3538.
Randall Crane, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Jeffrey Webb and Charles A. Annen, all present.
David Palace, Esq. for Defendants: First Legal Support Services LLC. and Elisha Gilboa, also present.
Matter settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Parties stipulated for a settlement in the sum of $7,770.00, half the sum to be mailed tomorrow to Mr. Crane as trustee, and the remaining half within 45 days by check to same. Each to bear own fees and costs, upon full payment, dimsissal with prejudice. If failed to pay in full, Judgment to be entered, upon declaration to the Court.
Parties waived all claims and to keep terms of settlement confidential.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.
Matter is place on the OSC for Sanction as to Mr. Palace, on Dec. 5, 2005 at 1:30 P.M. in Dept. 212, and on CRC-225 Calendar for Dismissal on Dec. 20, 2005 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212.
